metadata.description: Agentic Commerce Claude Code Plugins — UCP, ACP, A2A, AP2, MPP, WebMCP, Magento 2, BigCommerce, Shopify, WooCommerce, Salesforce Commerce, Medusa, and Saleor

plugins.name: ucp-agentic-commerce
plugins.description: Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) — Google/Shopify agentic commerce across REST, MCP, A2A, and Embedded bindings

plugins.name: acp-agentic-commerce
plugins.description: Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP) — OpenAI/Stripe open standard for AI-agent-mediated commerce

plugins.name: a2a-multi-agent
plugins.description: A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol — Google multi-agent communication with Agent Cards, tasks, and streaming

plugins.name: ap2-agentic-payments
plugins.description: AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol) — Google agentic payment mandates, VDCs, and cryptographic signing

plugins.name: magento2-commerce
plugins.description: Magento 2 Open Source — module development, DI, plugins, EAV, APIs, checkout, catalog, and PHP 8.x

plugins.name: webmcp-browser-agents
plugins.description: WebMCP (Web Model Context Protocol) — browser-native API for agent-ready websites, structured tool registration, declarative forms, and human-in-the-loop commerce

plugins.name: bigcommerce-commerce
plugins.description: BigCommerce — Stencil themes, REST/GraphQL APIs, single-click apps, checkout SDK, headless with Catalyst/Next.js, and Node.js patterns

plugins.name: shopify-commerce
plugins.description: Shopify — GraphQL Admin/Storefront APIs, Liquid, Online Store 2.0 themes, Hydrogen/Remix, Shopify Functions, checkout extensions, Polaris, and JS/TS/React patterns

plugins.name: woocommerce-commerce
plugins.description: WooCommerce — plugin/extension architecture, hooks/filters, REST API, checkout blocks, payment gateways, HPOS, and PHP 8.x patterns

plugins.name: salesforce-commerce
plugins.description: Salesforce Commerce — B2C Commerce Cloud (SFRA, ISML, SCAPI, PWA Kit) and B2B/D2C Commerce on Lightning (Apex, LWC, Experience Builder), Einstein AI, and JS/TS/React patterns

plugins.name: stripe-mpp
plugins.description: Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) — Stripe/Tempo HTTP 402 machine-to-machine payments, charge and session intents, mppx SDK, Tempo blockchain, SPTs, and service discovery

plugins.name: medusa-commerce
plugins.description: Medusa v2 — open-source headless commerce with custom modules, DML data models, workflows, API routes, subscribers, admin extensions, Next.js storefronts, and TypeScript/Node.js patterns

plugins.name: saleor-commerce
plugins.description: Saleor — open-source GraphQL-first headless commerce with Python/Django backend, App extensions, webhooks, Dashboard with App Bridge, Next.js storefronts, channels, typed attributes, and GraphQL/Python/Next.js patterns
